title: Kalree
content:
{{Top|leg|italics=1}}
[[File:Kalree_shu.jpg|thumb|right|250px|''Kalree'' fleeing [[XQ2 Platform]] ''[[Pondut]]'' under heavy fire.]]
[[Galactic Electronics]] Corporation used [[Lambda-class T-4a shuttle/Legends|Lambda-class T-4a shuttle]] '''''Kalree''''' during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]]. Shuttle ''Kalree'' attempted to flee [[XQ2 Platform]] ''[[Pondut]]'' carrying G.E.C. VIP's as an [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] assault force arrived during the "[[Arms Race]]." [[Imperial Intelligence/Legends|Imperial Intelligence]] had discovered the illegal arms deal between Galactic Electronics and the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance]], and thus dispatched the assault force to strip the research [[Space station/Legends|facility]] of all technology. This operation included the successful capture of Shuttle ''Kalree''.

==Appearances==
*[[Star Wars: TIE Fighter (video game)|''Star Wars: TIE Fighter'']] {{1st}}
